cleavage agent: Samples were digested with trypsin in solution or using the filter‐aided protocol (FASP)...
fragmentation method: Fragment ion spectra were produced via collision‐induced dissociation (CID)...
instrument: Samples were analyzed using a LTQ‐Orbitrap Velos Pro mass spectrometer...
ionization type: The mass spectrometer was operated in positive ionization mode...
labeling: we performed label‐free quantitative mass spectrometry...
